headline.purpose: Page titles and primary entry points.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button with restrained emphasis.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3b82f6; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #f3f4f6; color: #111827; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #e5e7eb; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3b82f6; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field with clear focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: grid; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #374151; } .ds-input { padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: #111827; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3b82f6; border-color: transparent; }

components.name: Card
components.html:
Summary
Group related information without visual noise.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 16px 24px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; color: #6b7280; }

components.name: Modal Panel
components.description: Elevated panel for critical tasks and confirmations.
components.html:
Edit Task
Keep modal content short and focused.
components.css: .ds-modal { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-modal-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-modal-body { font-size: 14px; color: #6b7280; }

narrative.overview:
Clarity over flair, minimal but beautiful, modern yet not mundane. The interface feels steady and predictable, built for focused work sessions where users can complete tasks quickly without visual noise. The system stays professional and supportive, keeping the work visible and the decisions small.

This system rejects generic SaaS dashboard aesthetics, neon, and glassmorphism. It favors calm, practical surfaces with one confident accent used for action and state.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color with a single confident accent
Crisp, restrained components with clear states

rules.name: The Quiet Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is reserved for action and state. It should not be used for decoration.

rules.name: The Working Scale Rule
rules.body: Keep a tight type scale and avoid oversized display styles in task screens.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Elevation is only used to separate layers.

dos: Do keep blue reserved for primary actions and focus states.
Do keep layouts predictable and task-oriented with clear grouping.
Do use crisp, restrained components with visible focus states.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard visuals.
Don't introduce neon or glassmorphism-heavy surfaces.
Don't prioritize visual flair over usability.
Don't use border-left or border-right accent stripes on cards or list items.
